subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-03-09
subcodes.first_line: The good deeds of man are like unto the sweet fragrances emanated from the musk... As his deeds have been performed with no reference to the applause and commendation of men he enjoys them more than any one else.
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @goodly deeds; actions, @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @spiritual transformation
